---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in WalletGuard Pro
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Open the popup and click '...'
3. Trigger transaction with calldata '...'
4. See error / wrong behavior

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the wallet safety score, risk factors shown, or any error text.

## Environment

- **WalletGuard Pro version:** (e.g. 1.5.0 — check chrome://extensions/)
- **Browser + version:** (e.g. Chrome 120.0.6099.130, Firefox 121.0)
- **Wallet provider:** (e.g. MetaMask 11.5.0, Rabby, Frame)
- **Chain:** (e.g. Ethereum mainnet, Optimism, Polygon)
- **dApp URL:** (if relevant — the site where the bug occurred)

## Screenshots / recordings

If applicable, attach a screenshot of the WalletGuard overlay or popup.
**Mask any sensitive addresses or amounts before uploading.**

## Console errors

If you opened DevTools (F12 → Console) when the bug happened, paste any red error messages here.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — does it happen every time, or only sometimes? Did it work in a previous version?

## Possible fix

Optional — if you have an idea where the bug might be in the code, link to the relevant file/line.
